content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"le soleil","translation":"die Sonne","pronunciation":"[lə sɔ.lɛj]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il fait beau avec le soleil.","exampleTranslation":"Es ist schön mit der Sonne.","usageNote":"Wird verwendet, wenn die Sonne scheint."},{"word":"le ciel","translation":"der Himmel","pronunciation":"[lə sje]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le ciel est bleu.","exampleTranslation":"Der Himmel ist blau.","usageNote":"Bezieht sich auf den Raum über uns."},{"word":"le nuage","translation":"der Wolke","pronunciation":"[lə nɥaʒ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il y a un grand nuage.","exampleTranslation":"Es gibt eine große Wolke.","usageNote":"Plural: les nuages."},{"word":"la pluie","translation":"der Regen","pronunciation":"[la pɥi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il pleut. Il y a de la pluie.","exampleTranslation":"Es regnet. Es gibt Regen.","usageNote":"Beachte: 'pleut' = es regnet."},{"word":"la neige","translation":"der Schnee","pronunciation":"[la nɛɡ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il neige dehors.","exampleTranslation":"Es schneit draußen.","usageNote":"Plural: les neiges (selten)."},{"word":"le vent","translation":"der Wind","pronunciation":"[lə vɑ̃]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le vent est fort.","exampleTranslation":"Der Wind ist stark.","usageNote":"Kann 'frisch' oder 'stark' sein."},{"word":"chaud","translation":"warm","pronunciation":"[ʃo]","partOfSpeech":"adjective","example":"Il fait chaud aujourd'hui.","exampleTranslation":"Heute ist es warm.","usageNote":"Nur für Temperatur, nicht für Menschen."},{"word":"froid","translation":"kalt","pronunciation":"[fʁwɑ]","partOfSpeech":"adjective","example":"Il fait froid dehors.","exampleTranslation":"Es ist draußen kalt.","usageNote":"Benutze mit 'il fait'."},{"word":"beau","translation":"schön","pronunciation":"[bo]","partOfSpeech":"adjective","example":"Le temps est beau.","exampleTranslation":"Das Wetter ist schön.","usageNote":"Für gute Wetterbedingungen."},{"word":"mauvais","translation":"schlecht","pronunciation":"[mɔ.vɛ]","partOfSpeech":"adjective","example":"Le temps est mauvais.","exampleTranslation":"Das Wetter ist schlecht.","usageNote":"Benutze für Regen, Sturm etc."},{"word":"pleuvoir","translation":"regnen","pronunciation":"[plø.vwɛʁ]","partOfSpeech":"verb","example":"Il pleut.","exampleTranslation":"Es regnet.","usageNote":"Benutze 'il pleut' für Regen."},{"word":"neiger","translation":"schneien","pronunciation":"[nɛ.ʒe]","partOfSpeech":"verb","example":"Il neige.","exampleTranslation":"Es schneit.","usageNote":"Benutze 'il neige' für Schnee."},{"word":"souffler","translation":"wehen","pronunciation":"[su.fle]","partOfSpeech":"verb","example":"Le vent souffle fort.","exampleTranslation":"Der Wind weht stark.","usageNote":"Bezieht sich auf den Wind."},{"word":"briller","translation":"glänzen","pronunciation":"[bʁi.je]","partOfSpeech":"verb","example":"Le soleil brille.","exampleTranslation":"Die Sonne glänzt.","usageNote":"Wird für Licht verwendet."},{"word":"couvrir","translation":"bedecken","pronunciation":"[ku.vriʁ]","partOfSpeech":"verb","example":"Les nuages couvrent le ciel.","exampleTranslation":"Die Wolken bedecken den Himmel.","usageNote":"Bedeckt etwas ganz oder teilweise."}]}
